chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-23 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 08-07-2025 Syed Mujahid Hussain Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. ****** At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that pensionery benefits including arrears have been released and credited into account of petitioner; therefore, purpose of petition has been served. Hence, under instructions, he does not wish to press instant petition, which is not opposed by learned AAG. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
